title: <div>EL is (or can be) a podcast. She doesn’t talk, thus, the listener can be pl
content:
EL is (or can be) a podcast. She doesn’t talk, thus, the listener can be placed in her own headphones, how she experiences the world.

Sandra’s face changes depending on what mood she is in. Like the Mayor of Nightmare Before Xmas.
